posts.author: laura.smith4_uchealt (Laura Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Our C-suite leadership is complaining that when they get an email notification, clicking the link takes them to the form view instead of the main table with all the submissions. We all agree that it would be handy if the default view for forms were the main table, because once the form has been created there’s really no reason for the form view to be the default view.

What are you trying to achieve

Would like Monday.com to change the default view for forms to be Main table instead of Form view.
